description_long: This is a four-tier bookcase with a minimalist, industrial design, featuring a black metal frame and four evenly spaced rectangular shelves. The shelves appear to be made of a light-colored wood or wood composite, providing a subtle contrast to the dark frame. The back of the bookcase is reinforced with two diagonal metal crossbars for added stability. The legs are slender and slightly elevated, giving the piece a light, airy appearance. The open sides and back allow for visibility and access from multiple angles, making it suitable for displaying books or decorative items. Its clean lines and neutral color palette make it versatile for urban interiors such as lofts, offices, or modern apartments.
description: A four-shelf, industrial-style bookcase with a black metal frame and light wood shelves, featuring open sides and crossbar supports at the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four shelves, the black frame, and the diagonal crossbars at the back.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the slender profile of the frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full crossbar support structure and the open back design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the shelf depth and frame profile.
